subject: feat(export): add LinkedIn aspect ratios and PDF export
body:
Replace single LinkedIn Post (1200×627) with three LinkedIn-recommended
formats: Square (1080×1080), Portrait (1080×1350), Landscape (1920×1080).
Add PDF export using browser print dialog for LinkedIn carousels and
general print-to-PDF use cases.

Tags: export, platforms, linkedin, pdf
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: export-improvements
Semver: minor

title: add LinkedIn aspect ratios and PDF export
